positive: A maximalist, elegant illustration featuring bioluminescent, stylized botanical elements intertwined with deep space cosmic nebulae. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, creating a strong, repeating silhouette suitable for a chest print. Use Art Nouveau and Celestial fantasy aesthetics. The color palette should contrast highly: deep indigo and midnight blue background contrasted with vibrant, glowing accents of iridescent teal, emerald green, and molten gold. Focus on clean linework, fractal details, and glowing light sources giving an ethereal, otherworldly glow. High contrast, vector-art quality, highly detailed.
negative: low resolution, blurry, grainy, artifacts, noise, watermarks, text, signature, logo, extra limbs, deformed, bad anatomy, cropped, poorly drawn, oversaturated, muted, gradient fade
